SendMessageResponse.SendMessageResult: <?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?><TransferMessage xmlns:xsd="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema" xmlns:xsi="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema-instance" xmlns="http://issi.transfer.bg/messaging/v1"><Header><MessageType>TransferError</MessageType><TransferDate>2024-10-15T01:00:10.2345917+03:00</TransferDate><TransferGUID>9bdf7d09d08940bb9418cc52c6e1caca</TransferGUID></Header><Body><Error><TransferGUID>9bdf7d09d08940bb9418cc52c6e1caca</TransferGUID><ErrorDescription>Грешка при подателя.
